Seat 1: Hero (43,184 in chips)
Seat 4: 66e3ae3c (31,816 in chips)
66e3ae3c: posts the ante 100
Hero: posts the ante 100
Hero: posts small blind 500
66e3ae3c: posts big blind 1,000
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Qs Qh]

Hero: raises 1,000 to 2,000
66e3ae3c: raises 4,200 to 6,200
Hero: raises 7,800 to 14,000
66e3ae3c: calls 7,800

66e3ae3c: checks
Hero: bets 29,084 and is all-in
66e3ae3c: calls 17,716 and is all-in
Uncalled bet (11,368) returned to Hero
Hero: shows [Qs Qh] (a pair of Queens)
66e3ae3c: shows [8d 8c] (a pair of Eights)
*** TURN *** [6c 2h 5d] [6s]
*** RIVER *** [6c 2h 5d 6s] [Ac]
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected 63,632 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
